objections.description: WCAG contrast claims are unverified and potentially incorrect. Light theme --color-text-tertiary (#86868B) on #FFFFFF is approximately 4.0:1, not 4.5:1 as claimed. This fails AA for normal text. Dark theme --color-text-tertiary (#6E6E73) on #0A0A0B needs independent verification before shipping.
objections.suggested_fix: Run actual contrast calculations using WCAG 2.1 formula. Adjust light theme tertiary to #76767B minimum (4.54:1). Add automated contrast checking to CI pipeline using axe-core or similar.

objections.description: Touch target compliance gap. Button vertical padding defined as --space-2 (8px) with typical 14-16px text height yields ~30-32px total, failing the stated --touch-target-min of 44px. This contradicts WCAG 2.5.5/2.5.8 compliance claims.
objections.suggested_fix: Define explicit button min-height: var(--touch-target-min) in component styles. Update spacing guidelines to specify --space-3 (12px) minimum vertical padding for interactive elements.

objections.description: Motion system contradicts itself. Section 4.1 states 'will-change applied only during animation, removed after completion via animationend listener' but CSS classes in 4.4 show no will-change management. The --ease-standard cubic-bezier(0.2,0,0.2,1) is functionally equivalent to ease, violating the 'no ease' rule.
objections.suggested_fix: Add will-change: transform, opacity to animated classes with JavaScript cleanup via animationend. Replace --ease-standard with distinctly non-ease curve like cubic-bezier(0.15,0,0.15,1).

objections.description: Border-width tokens completely missing. Radii defined but no --border-width-* tokens for consistent stroke weights across components. This will cause visual inconsistency in production.

Reduced motion skeleton handling incomplete. States skeleton pulse should be 'Replaced — static 0.5 opacity' but @keyframes skeletonPulse still defined without showing how it's conditionally disabled. The prefers-reduced-motion media query only sets durations to 0ms, which would freeze skeleton at initial state.
objections.suggested_fix: Add separate .skeleton-static class with fixed opacity: 0.5 for reduced motion users. Document conditional class application in component usage guidelines.

objections.description: DataView described as 'Generic 4-state renderer' but spec never defines what the 4 states are. This ambiguity will cause implementation inconsistency across features.
objections.suggested_fix: Explicitly document: loading, empty, error, success. Add prop interface specification for each state's render callback.

suggestions.description: Add --z-dropdown-inside-modal: 450 for dropdowns rendered within modal contexts to prevent stacking issues when modals contain dropdown menus.
Add --text-4xl: 3rem with --leading-4xl: 3.5rem for dashboard metrics and large numerical displays that need visual prominence.
FOUC prevention script should also check for 'theme' in sessionStorage as fallback for cases where localStorage is disabled in private browsing modes.
Add --color-surface-disabled token for consistent disabled state styling across all interactive surfaces instead of ad-hoc opacity values.
